name: 嘲諷型（看不起人）
description: 以身份地位嘲笑女主，語氣輕蔑。功能是讓觀眾對反派產生厭惡，為女主的逆襲蓄力。嘲諷越狠，打臉越爽。
tags: 積蓄觀眾憤怒，為打臉蓄力

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: You're just a lousy janitor. What do you know? Don't even talk about making products. / Gun, stop deluding yourself. You want to marry into a rich family? You're not even in the league. / Turns out she's supposedly so ugly she's afraid to show her face.
examples.context: 積蓄觀眾憤怒，為打臉蓄力
